title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Digital Art Without PayPal That Actually Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: As a digital creator in Nigeria, you know the frustration of being locked out of PayPal and Stripe, leaving you without a reliable way to sell your art. You're not alone - millions of creators in restricted countries face this same problem. Without access to these payment giants, you're forced to explore alternative options that can actually work for you. The question is, which one will get you paid without the hassle?
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to selling digital art without PayPal, you have a few options. Some platforms promise the world but deliver little. Others, like crypto-native solutions, offer a more straightforward approach. These solutions provide a simple, no-KYC-required way to accept payments in various cryptocurrencies, giving you more control over your sales. However, each option has its tradeoffs, and understanding what they actually offer is crucial to making an informed decision.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Platforms like PayPal and Stripe exclude certain countries due to regulatory issues or business decisions. Crypto-native solutions, on the other hand, are more inclusive, allowing creators from restricted countries to sell their art without jumping through hoops. This openness is a significant advantage for creators who've been locked out of traditional payment systems. By using crypto-native infrastructure, you can reach a global audience without worrying about geographical restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed and fees are critical factors when choosing a sales platform. Traditional platforms often charge high fees, and payment speeds can be slow. Crypto-native solutions typically offer faster payment processing and lower fees, but the volatility of cryptocurrencies can be a concern. Understanding the real costs of each option, including any potential risks, is essential to maximizing your earnings. By comparing these factors, you can make a more informed decision about which platform is right for you.
Crypto-native solutions offer more control over your sales.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are vital for a seamless sales experience. Some platforms provide robust automation features, such as instant delivery and payment verification, while others require more manual effort. Crypto-native solutions often prioritize automation, ensuring that your sales process is efficient and hassle-free. By leveraging these capabilities, you can focus on creating more art and growing your business, rather than getting bogged down in administrative tasks.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the best option for you depends on your specific needs and circumstances.
